1.title: Thread Pool Worker Threads
1.query:
timeseries threads = avg(dt.runtime.clr.threadpool.threads, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(threads) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Thread Pool IO Completion Threads
2.query:
timeseries threads = avg(dt.runtime.clr.threadpool.threads, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(threads) desc
| limit 10

3.title: Thread Pool Queued Work Items
3.query:
timeseries queued_work_items = avg(dt.runtime.clr.threadpool.queued_work_items, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(queued_work_items) desc
| limit 10
